text:
{
  "isSuspicious": true,
  "deviation": "Powershell.exe performed reconnaissance by spawning 'whoami /groups', stored a Base64-encoded PowerShell command in an unusual registry key (HKU\\...\\Software\\Microsoft\\Windows\\Upd), and modified the 'ms-settings' URI handler to execute a hidden PowerShell command that retrieves and executes content from the registry. This indicates persistence and malicious execution.",
  "indicators": [
    "powershell.exe spawning whoami.exe /groups",
    "registry key HKU\\...\\Software\\Microsoft\\Windows\\Upd used for storing encoded command",
    "Base64 encoded PowerShell command in registry",
    "modification of ms-settings URI handler for hidden PowerShell execution",
    "powershell.exe -NoP -NonI -W Hidden -c"
  ]
}
